summary: Final audit report for Chapter 5 of the precision agriculture thesis. Documents all 6 fixes applied: (1) removed fabricated 5-15% margin from Kamilaris citation, (2) removed misattributed 10-20% accuracy drop from Nyborg citation, (3) corrected overstated VRT savings from Vizzari citation, (4) fixed residual old 45.2% savings figure, (5) replaced fabricated Biney & Boakye 2023 with verified Baddianaah et al. 2023, (6) re-cited Forestry Commission data as grey literature via GNA. Includes full verified reference list with 22 citations.
